component.name: Owera Things4Linux
component.summary: A Things-inspired to-do app that syncs with Things Cloud

description.p: Owera Things4Linux is a native Linux to-do app, inspired by Cultured Code's Things 3, that synchronises two-way with your existing Things Cloud account. It is built with GTK4 and libadwaita and works offline-first.

ul.li: The built-in lists: Inbox, Today (with This Evening), Upcoming, Anytime, Someday, Logbook and Trash
Areas, Projects and To-Dos with notes, a "When" date and a deadline
Quick Find search and keyboard shortcuts

description.p: Owera Things4Linux is unofficial and not affiliated with Cultured Code; it uses a community reverse-engineered protocol.

screenshot.caption: The Today view, with This Evening, tags and a deadline

description.p: First release: built-in lists, areas/projects/to-dos, tags, Quick Find, and two-way Things Cloud sync.
